title: DFU - Three Easy Steps page - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: Verify that disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds during DFU update on the Three Easy Steps page shows appropriate error popup and returns user to the same page.
steps: Connect both earbuds, navigate to Software Update, tap Update then Continue to open the Three Easy Steps page.
Disconnect the Right Earbud (place in charge case, close case if needed) and tap Start Update.
Disconnect Right Earbud again and tap Start Update.
expected: Step 2: "Update currently not available, please try back later" popup appears. Step 3: Popup remains. Step 4: Popup closes and user returns to Three Easy Steps page. Step 5: Same popup appears. Step 6: Popup remains. Step 7: Popup closes and user returns to Three Easy Steps page.
